TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Tgiya tunux = Qnbahang ta kesun pusu mnarux nii we, ado naqah hari tnalang na ka ddara hei, duma naq we mnkambo (mtiiyus mnarux) duri peni,kiya ka mtgiya tunux di. Mtgiya tunux ciida de maha twilaq ka doriq ma so sceecu mkpberih, uka brahan tutuy ma kksaan na we kingal naq hari duri, mbeyax tlamun ka toma bahak, mkala baro ka dara, ini hari qbahang ka birac,ini leexan qmita ka doriq duri, so nii ka krnexan na. Pgkela pkmalu ndaan nii: Tg.kingal:Msange tqeraq nniqan tqiyan na gseesu. Tg.daha: Ado kcugun mtakur ka tgiya tunux,mktutuy ciida we asi ka niqan seediq sdalun ssiyo,pllayun ptloung hayan ma sthuwe tuting bobo qlapo ma dyago wakun mkkesa. Tg.teru:Ini hrinas ceka rabi ka mtaqi ma ini scuqi meepah. Tg.sepac:Smeung naq mimah kahwe, ocya,sino ma uuqun so mremun daha ka msibus duri. Tg.rima:Kntaanun tgiya tunux ka ali ali de, asi ka ini ksange maha spuhan ma pqita ising. Mnetun su so nii di nhari mosa pqita ising: Tg.kingal:Ini alix tgiya tunux ma mnriyung mnarux duri peni. Tg.daha:Mnarux riyung tunux ma mkpberih ma so seecu peni. Tg.teru: Ini hari tkela. Tg.sapac:Mnarux nbuyas ma mnarux teerang, mnarux bukuy duri. Tg.rima:Mciicil ka kksaun Tg.mmteru:Amah ka qmita ani maanu (So hari mdaha kana ka qntaan ) Tg.mpitu:Uka beyax ka icil baga daha ka papak, duma naq maxi duri. Pnyahan pnatas #:~:text=%E6%87%89%E5%9C%A8%E5%AE%89%E9%9D%9C%E7%9A%84%E7%92%B0%E5%A2%83%E4%B8%8B%E8%87%A5%E5%BA%8A%E4%BC%91%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82%20%E6%AC%B2%E4%B8%8B%E5%BA%8A%E6%B4%BB%E5%8B%95%E6%99%82%E6%87%89%E9%9C%80%E6%9C%89%E4%BA%BA%E9%99%AA%E4%BC%B4%E6%89%B6%E6%8C%81%2C%E4%B8%94%E6%87%89%E5%85%88%E6%8E%A1%E5%9D%90%E5%A7%BF%E5%BE%8C%E5%BE%85%E9%A0%AD%E6%9A%88%E7%B7%A9%E8%A7%A3%E5%86%8D%E6%85%A2%E6%85%A2%E4%B8%8B%E5%BA%8A%2C%E4%BB%A5%E5%85%8D%E5%9B%A0%E7%9C%A9%E6%9A%88%E8%80%8C%E7%94%A2%E7%94%9F%E8%B7%8C%E5%80%92%E3%80%82,%E6%87%89%E9%81%BF%E5%85%8D%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%A3%93%E5%8A%9B%E5%8F%8A%E7%9D%A1%E7%9C%A0%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%B3%E7%9A%84%E6%83%85%E5%BD%A2%E3%80%82%20%E6%87%89%E7%9B%A1%E9%87%8F%E5%B0%91%E6%94%9D%E5%8F%96%E5%92%96%E5%95%A1%E3%80%81%E6%BF%83%E8%8C%B6%E3%80%81%E8%8F%B8%E3%80%81%E9%85%92%E3%80%81%E5%B7%A7%E5%85%8B%E5%8A%9B%E6%88%96%E5%A4%AA%E9%B9%B9%E7%9A%84%E9%A3%9F%E7%89%A9%E3%80%82%20%E7%9C%A9%E6%9A%88%E7%97%87%E7%8B%80%E9%80%9A%E5%B8%B8%E6%9C%83%E6%8C%81%E7%BA%8C%E6%95%B8%E6%97%A5%2C%E8%AB%8B%E5%9B%9E%E7%A5%9E%E7%B6%93%E5%85%A7%E7%A7%91%2F%E8%80%B3%E9%BC%BB%E5%96%89%E7%A7%91%E8%A4%87%E8%A8%BA%E7%B9%BC%E7%BA%8C%E8%BF%BD%E8%B9%A4%E6%B2%BB%E7%99%82%E3%80%82 Tseeru na mptgesa Aking Puhuk ka pnatis nii.
S.PHON: = tgija tunux = qnbaħaŋ ta kəsun pusu mnaɾux nii wə, ado naqaħ ħaɾi tnalaŋ na ka ddaɾa ħəi, duma naq wə mnkambo (mtiijus mnaɾux) duɾi pəni,kija ka mtgija tunux di. mtgija tunux ʦiida də maħa twilaq ka doɾiq ma so sʦəəʦu mkpbəɾiħ, uka bɾaħan tutuj ma kksaan na wə kiŋal naq ħaɾi duɾi, mbəax tlamun ka toma baħak, mkala baɾo ka daɾa, ini ħaɾi qbaħaŋ ka biɾaʦ,ini ləəxan qmita ka doɾiq duɾi, so nii ka kɾnəxan na. pgkəla pkmalu ndaan nii: tg.kiŋal:msaŋə tqəɾaq nniqan tqijan na gsəəsu. tg.daħa: ado kʦugun mtakuɾ ka tgija tunux,mktutuj ʦiida wə asi ka niqan səədiq sdalun ssijo,pllajun ptlouŋ ħajan ma stħuwə tutiŋ bobo qlapo ma djago wakun mkkəsa. tg.təɾu:ini ħɾinas ʦəka ɾabi ka mtaqi ma ini sʦuqi məəpaħ. tg.səpaʦ:sməuŋ naq mimaħ kaħwə, oʦja,sino ma uuqun so mɾəmun daħa ka msibus duɾi. tg.ɾima:kntaanun tgija tunux ka ali ali də, asi ka ini ksaŋə maħa spuħan ma pqita isiŋ. mnətun su so nii di nħaɾi mosa pqita isiŋ: tg.kiŋal:ini alix tgija tunux ma mnɾijuŋ mnaɾux duɾi pəni. tg.daħa:mnaɾux ɾijuŋ tunux ma mkpbəɾiħ ma so səəʦu pəni. tg.təɾu: ini ħaɾi tkəla. tg.sapaʦ:mnaɾux nbujas ma mnaɾux təəɾaŋ, mnaɾux bukuj duɾi. tg.ɾima:mʦiiʦil ka kksaun tg.mmtəɾu:amaħ ka qmita ani maanu (so ħaɾi mdaħa kana ka qntaan ) tg.mpitu:uka bəax ka iʦil baga daħa ka papak, duma naq maxi duɾi. pnjaħan pnatas #:~:təxt=%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%aə%**%ə*%*d%*ʦ%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%a*%**%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%**%a*%ə*%ba%*a%ə*%bʦ%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%aʦ%b*%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%ba%*a%ə*%b*%bb%ə*%*b%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%ba%ba%ə*%**%aa%ə*%bʦ%b*%ə*%**%b*%ə*%*ʦ%**%*ʦ%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ə%a*%ə*%*d%**%ə*%a*%b*%ə*%bə%*ʦ%ə*%bə%**%ə*%a*%ad%ə*%*a%**%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%a*%a*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%a*%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%ba%*a%*ʦ%ə*%bb%a*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%*b%a*%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%*ʦ%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%*ʦ%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**,%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%bd%*ʦ%ə*%a*%**%ə*%*a%*b%ə*%**%*a%ə*%*d%a*%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%b*%*d%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%bd%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*b%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%*d%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%**%ə*%*ʦ%b*%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%**%*b%ə*%*a%*b%ə*%**%**%ə*%a*%aa%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*b%**%ə*%**%*a%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%ba%*ʦ%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%a*%*ʦ%ə*%ab%*b%ə*%*b%*ə%ə*%a*%*ə%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%a*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%bʦ%bb%ə*%**%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%a*%ba%ə*%b*%bʦ%ə*%ba%*ʦ%ə*%b*%bd%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%b*%bb%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%** tsəəɾu na mptgəsa akiŋ puħuk ka pnatis nii.
S.FORM: = Tgiya tunux = Qnbahang ta kesun pusu mnarux nii we, ado naqah hari tnalang na ka ddara hei, duma naq we mnkambo (mtiiyus mnarux) duri peni,kiya ka mtgiya tunux di. Mtgiya tunux ciida de maha twilaq ka doriq ma so sceecu mkpberih, uka brahan tutuy ma kksaan na we kingal naq hari duri, mbeyax tlamun ka toma bahak, mkala baro ka dara, ini hari qbahang ka birac,ini leexan qmita ka doriq duri, so nii ka krnexan na. Pgkela pkmalu ndaan nii: Tg.kingal:Msange tqeraq nniqan tqiyan na gseesu. Tg.daha: Ado kcugun mtakur ka tgiya tunux,mktutuy ciida we asi ka niqan seediq sdalun ssiyo,pllayun ptloung hayan ma sthuwe tuting bobo qlapo ma dyago wakun mkkesa. Tg.teru:Ini hrinas ceka rabi ka mtaqi ma ini scuqi meepah. Tg.sepac:Smeung naq mimah kahwe, ocya,sino ma uuqun so mremun daha ka msibus duri. Tg.rima:Kntaanun tgiya tunux ka ali ali de, asi ka ini ksange maha spuhan ma pqita ising. Mnetun su so nii di nhari mosa pqita ising: Tg.kingal:Ini alix tgiya tunux ma mnriyung mnarux duri peni. Tg.daha:Mnarux riyung tunux ma mkpberih ma so seecu peni. Tg.teru: Ini hari tkela. Tg.sapac:Mnarux nbuyas ma mnarux teerang, mnarux bukuy duri. Tg.rima:Mciicil ka kksaun Tg.mmteru:Amah ka qmita ani maanu (So hari mdaha kana ka qntaan ) Tg.mpitu:Uka beyax ka icil baga daha ka papak, duma naq maxi duri. Pnyahan pnatas #:~:text=%E6%87%89%E5%9C%A8%E5%AE%89%E9%9D%9C%E7%9A%84%E7%92%B0%E5%A2%83%E4%B8%8B%E8%87%A5%E5%BA%8A%E4%BC%91%E6%81%AF%E3%80%82%20%E6%AC%B2%E4%B8%8B%E5%BA%8A%E6%B4%BB%E5%8B%95%E6%99%82%E6%87%89%E9%9C%80%E6%9C%89%E4%BA%BA%E9%99%AA%E4%BC%B4%E6%89%B6%E6%8C%81%2C%E4%B8%94%E6%87%89%E5%85%88%E6%8E%A1%E5%9D%90%E5%A7%BF%E5%BE%8C%E5%BE%85%E9%A0%AD%E6%9A%88%E7%B7%A9%E8%A7%A3%E5%86%8D%E6%85%A2%E6%85%A2%E4%B8%8B%E5%BA%8A%2C%E4%BB%A5%E5%85%8D%E5%9B%A0%E7%9C%A9%E6%9A%88%E8%80%8C%E7%94%A2%E7%94%9F%E8%B7%8C%E5%80%92%E3%80%82,%E6%87%89%E9%81%BF%E5%85%8D%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%A3%93%E5%8A%9B%E5%8F%8A%E7%9D%A1%E7%9C%A0%E4%B8%8D%E8%B6%B3%E7%9A%84%E6%83%85%E5%BD%A2%E3%80%82%20%E6%87%89%E7%9B%A1%E9%87%8F%E5%B0%91%E6%94%9D%E5%8F%96%E5%92%96%E5%95%A1%E3%80%81%E6%BF%83%E8%8C%B6%E3%80%81%E8%8F%B8%E3%80%81%E9%85%92%E3%80%81%E5%B7%A7%E5%85%8B%E5%8A%9B%E6%88%96%E5%A4%AA%E9%B9%B9%E7%9A%84%E9%A3%9F%E7%89%A9%E3%80%82%20%E7%9C%A9%E6%9A%88%E7%97%87%E7%8B%80%E9%80%9A%E5%B8%B8%E6%9C%83%E6%8C%81%E7%BA%8C%E6%95%B8%E6%97%A5%2C%E8%AB%8B%E5%9B%9E%E7%A5%9E%E7%B6%93%E5%85%A7%E7%A7%91%2F%E8%80%B3%E9%BC%BB%E5%96%89%E7%A7%91%E8%A4%87%E8%A8%BA%E7%B9%BC%E7%BA%8C%E8%BF%BD%E8%B9%A4%E6%B2%BB%E7%99%82%E3%80%82 Tseeru na mptgesa Aking Puhuk ka pnatis nii.
S.PHON: = tgija tunux = qnbaħaŋ ta kəsun pusu mnaɾux nii wə, ado naqaħ ħaɾi tnalaŋ na ka ddaɾa ħəi, duma naq wə mnkambo (mtiijus mnaɾux) duɾi pəni,kija ka mtgija tunux di. mtgija tunux ʦiida də maħa twilaq ka doɾiq ma so sʦəəʦu mkpbəɾiħ, uka bɾaħan tutuj ma kksaan na wə kiŋal naq ħaɾi duɾi, mbəax tlamun ka toma baħak, mkala baɾo ka daɾa, ini ħaɾi qbaħaŋ ka biɾaʦ,ini ləəxan qmita ka doɾiq duɾi, so nii ka kɾnəxan na. pgkəla pkmalu ndaan nii: tg.kiŋal:msaŋə tqəɾaq nniqan tqijan na gsəəsu. tg.daħa: ado kʦugun mtakuɾ ka tgija tunux,mktutuj ʦiida wə asi ka niqan səədiq sdalun ssijo,pllajun ptlouŋ ħajan ma stħuwə tutiŋ bobo qlapo ma djago wakun mkkəsa. tg.təɾu:ini ħɾinas ʦəka ɾabi ka mtaqi ma ini sʦuqi məəpaħ. tg.səpaʦ:sməuŋ naq mimaħ kaħwə, oʦja,sino ma uuqun so mɾəmun daħa ka msibus duɾi. tg.ɾima:kntaanun tgija tunux ka ali ali də, asi ka ini ksaŋə maħa spuħan ma pqita isiŋ. mnətun su so nii di nħaɾi mosa pqita isiŋ: tg.kiŋal:ini alix tgija tunux ma mnɾijuŋ mnaɾux duɾi pəni. tg.daħa:mnaɾux ɾijuŋ tunux ma mkpbəɾiħ ma so səəʦu pəni. tg.təɾu: ini ħaɾi tkəla. tg.sapaʦ:mnaɾux nbujas ma mnaɾux təəɾaŋ, mnaɾux bukuj duɾi. tg.ɾima:mʦiiʦil ka kksaun tg.mmtəɾu:amaħ ka qmita ani maanu (so ħaɾi mdaħa kana ka qntaan ) tg.mpitu:uka bəax ka iʦil baga daħa ka papak, duma naq maxi duɾi. pnjaħan pnatas #:~:təxt=%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%aə%**%ə*%*d%*ʦ%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%a*%**%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%**%a*%ə*%ba%*a%ə*%bʦ%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%aʦ%b*%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%ba%*a%ə*%b*%bb%ə*%*b%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%ba%ba%ə*%**%aa%ə*%bʦ%b*%ə*%**%b*%ə*%*ʦ%**%*ʦ%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*ə%a*%ə*%*d%**%ə*%a*%b*%ə*%bə%*ʦ%ə*%bə%**%ə*%a*%ad%ə*%*a%**%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%a*%a*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%a*%ə*%b*%*b%ə*%ba%*a%*ʦ%ə*%bb%a*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%*b%a*%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%*ʦ%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%*ʦ%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**,%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%*d%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%bd%*ʦ%ə*%a*%**%ə*%*a%*b%ə*%**%*a%ə*%*d%a*%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%b*%*d%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%bd%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*b%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%*d%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%**%ə*%*ʦ%b*%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%**%*b%ə*%*a%*b%ə*%**%**%ə*%a*%aa%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%**%**%**%ə*%*ʦ%a*%ə*%*a%**%ə*%**%**%ə*%*b%**%ə*%**%*a%ə*%b*%b*%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%*ʦ%**%ə*%ba%*ʦ%ə*%**%b*%ə*%**%a*%*ʦ%ə*%ab%*b%ə*%*b%*ə%ə*%a*%*ə%ə*%b*%**%ə*%**%a*%ə*%a*%**%**%ə*%**%b*%ə*%bʦ%bb%ə*%**%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%a*%**%ə*%a*%ba%ə*%b*%bʦ%ə*%ba%*ʦ%ə*%b*%bd%ə*%b*%a*%ə*%b*%bb%ə*%**%**%ə*%**%** tsəəɾu na mptgəsa akiŋ puħuk ka pnatis nii.
